g.text: The repair ladder: never fail blindly, never continue silently
escalate narrowly; each rung is cheaper than the one below it
an expect or verify check FAILS on step k
re-derive ONE step, emit a versioned patch
the task FAILS, cleanly - and logs WHY
a failed live expect buys ONE scoped
repair (#49); exhausting the budget is fatal
worst case = not having Rote at all
invariant 1: a failed check can never become success · a scoped repair costs ~1 step; a blind restart costs the whole task
